column1: # Config for merge_all.py — lists all models and dbNSFP to merge.
#   label      score column prefix in merged.tsv ({label}_score)
#   path       path to the prediction TSV
#   highlight  yes | no  — whether to highlight in plots (e.g. our fine-tuned models)
#              if this column is omitted, all finetune rows are highlighted by default
# The FIRST non-dbnsfp row is the primary model (provides key columns for the merge base).
# dbnsfp rows are joined on all key columns and add all their score columns as-is.
